description: Create a GitLab CI pipeline with a single build stage, a global cpm cache at .cache/cpm, and variables CLICOLOR_FORCE='1', CPM_SOURCE_CACHE='${CI_PROJECT_DIR}/.cache/cpm', TERM='xterm'. Add an android job using image registry.gitlab.com/jhasse/android-ndk-docker:r27c that runs `make -C android`. Add a linux job using fedora:$VERSION with a matrix of VERSION values 40, 41, and latest; it installs build tools via `dnf install -y cmake ninja-build gcc-c++ fontconfig-devel freetype-devel libvorbis-devel libwebp-devel SDL2-devel libtheora-devel clang util-linux clang-tools-extra >/dev/null`, runs `.github/ci.py`, configures with `cmake -Bbuild -G"Ninja Multi-Config" -DCMAKE_COMPILE_WARNING_AS_ERROR=1`, builds with `ninja` and `ninja -f build-Release.ninja`, installs drivers, starts Xorg, runs unit tests in Debug and Release, then reconfigures with clang using `CC=clang CXX=clang++ CXXFLAGS=-fdiagnostics-color cmake -Bbuild-clang -GNinja -DCMAKE_EXPORT_COMPILE_COMMANDS=1 -DJNGL_CLANG_TIDY=1` and builds again; it fails the job unless VERSION is "latest", in which case it is allowed to fail. Add a mingw job also using fedora:$VERSION with the same matrix and failure rules, installing mingw packages via `dnf install -y cmake ninja-build mingw64-pkg-config mingw64-libvorbis mingw64-SDL2 mingw64-fontconfig mingw64-libwebp mingw64-dlfcn mingw64-gcc-c++ > /dev/null`, building with `mingw64-cmake -G"Ninja Multi-Config" -Bbuild-mingw -DJNGL_WINAPI=0` and `mingw64-cmake -G"Ninja Multi-Config" -Bbuild-winapi -DJNGL_WINAPI=1`, each followed by `ninja` and `ninja -f build-Release.ninja`. Add a steamos job using image registry.gitlab.steamos.cloud/steamrt/sniper/sdk that installs boost and clang, sets `LDFLAGS=-static-libstdc++`, `CXXFLAGS=-stdlib=libc++`, `CC=clang-16`, `CXX=clang++-16`, configures and builds Debug and Release builds with cmake and ninja, installs a dummy X server, runs Xorg, and executes unit tests. Finally, add a web job using emscripten/emsdk:$VERSION with matrix values 3.1.61, 3.1.74, latest, allowing failure for latest; it runs `emcmake cmake -Bbuild-web -DCMAKE_COMPILE_WARNING_AS_ERROR=1`, copies data, builds with `make -j$(nproc)`, then moves the generated jngl-test.* files into `public/demo`, and publishes the `public/demo` directory as an artifact.
